step_rationale: Simple sugar; systemic metabolic marker associated with MI mortality risk but not plaque-specific.
mechanism: Mannose reflects altered carbohydrate metabolism and systemic stress in acute myocardial infarction.

references.title: Differential Network Analysis Reveals Metabolic Determinants Associated with Mortality in Acute Myocardial Infarction Patients and Suggests Potential Mechanisms Underlying Different Clinical Scores Used To Predict Death.

trials.title: Influence of Periodontal Disease Treatment on Serum Levels of Sirtuin 1 and Mannose-binding Lectin in Individuals With Coronary Artery Disease
Associations Between Serum Lipids and Mannose Levels in Coronary Artery Disease Among Nondiabetic Patients
interventions: Laboratory parameter levels in blood samples
